headline: Guy's 'I'm A Nice Guy' Apology Is Just Him Explaining Why She's Wrong To Be Upset
summary: 'I'm sorry you feel that way' was followed by 47 reasons why her feelings are invalid.
fullBody: Jake NiceGuy delivered the classic non-apology: 'I'm sorry you feel that way, but actually here's why you're wrong.' The monologue lasted 45 minutes. His girlfriend left. 'I don't understand,' Jake said. 'I apologized.' His ex has started a podcast called 'Why Men Can't Apologize.' Jake called it 'unfair.' The irony is lost on him. He is now 'working on himself' — alone.
